brand_notes: Audi's 2026 US lineup is in transition. Confirmed excluded: A4 (replaced by A5 in 2025+ naming convention - odd=ICE, even=EV); A7/S7 (discontinued for 2026 MY, replaced by new A6 TFSI); A6 e-tron / S6 e-tron / Q6 e-tron / SQ6 e-tron (skipped 2026 MY in US — Audi went straight to 2027 MY for these); Q8 e-tron / SQ8 e-tron (discontinued globally); TT/TT RS and R8 (discontinued 2023); RS Q3 (not US market); RS 5 (next-gen B10 not yet on sale in US for 2026); Q9 (announced but not on sale). Audi-wide for 2026: Audi Signature Care scheduled maintenance is now included on all new 2026 models (3yr/30k). Manufacturer site audiusa.com returns 403 to WebFetch; cited as canonical URL but secondary cross-validation used for specs. EPA data verified individually on fueleconomy.gov.

models.generation_context: Current 4th-gen Audi A3 sedan (8Y), facelift introduced for 2025 MY. For 2026 the previously optional Technology Package contents (12.3-inch virtual cockpit plus, MMI navigation plus, traffic sign recognition, 3-year Audi connect PLUS) are now standard.
models.model_summary: Audi's entry-level luxury compact sedan, powered by a 201 hp turbocharged 2.0L four-cylinder paired to a 7-speed S tronic dual-clutch automatic with standard quattro all-wheel drive. The 2026 model standardizes the digital cockpit and navigation suite. Available in Premium and Premium Plus trims.

reliability.summary: JD Power has not published a 2026 model-specific VDS score (VDS measures 3-year-old vehicles). The current-gen A3 platform (MQB Evo) is shared with the VW Golf/Jetta and has a generally average reliability record per Consumer Reports.

customer_satisfaction.summary: JD Power 2026 APEAL Study has NOT yet been published as of 2026-05-15 (the US APEAL Study typically releases in July). No 2026 model-specific APEAL score is available for this model. The 2025 APEAL score may be applicable as carryover but has not been adopted here pending the 2026 release.

professional_reviews.summary: Reviewers describe the 2026 A3 as a premium-feeling small sedan that competes capably with the Mercedes CLA and BMW 2 Series Gran Coupe. Praise centers on the build quality, ride/handling balance, and standard quattro AWD. Criticisms focus on a modest 8.3 cu ft trunk and a price that creeps near a base A5.

owner_reviews.summary: Edmunds and KBB owner-review pages for the 2026 A3 are sparse this early in the model year. Carryover sentiment from 2024-2025 owners is positive on driving feel and interior tech, mixed on rear-seat room.

notable_other: 12.3-inch Audi virtual cockpit plus standard for 2026

trims.notes: Base trim of the A3 ICE powertrain line. Manufacturer primary source 403 to WebFetch; spec values cross-validated against multiple secondary sources during research. NHTSA has not yet rated the 2026 A3. IIHS 2026 award list does not include A3.

notable_other: Adaptive cruise control with active lane assist

changes: Adds Bang & Olufsen 3D Premium sound system
Adds adaptive cruise control with active lane assist
Adds leather seating surfaces (vs synthetic leather)
Adds memory function for driver seat

trims.notes: Step-up from Premium. 2026 makes ADAS suite (adaptive cruise, lane assist, side assist) standard. Most dimensions and powertrain unchanged from base; null'd to avoid duplication.

models.notes: A3 lineup simplified for 2026 to Premium and Premium Plus. Trunk only (8.3 cu ft); no hatch variant in US.

models.generation_context: Performance variant of the current 4th-gen Audi A3 sedan. The S3's trim-level lineup was pruned from three to a single trim for 2026 MY (Prestige equipment carried over to options packages).
models.model_summary: The S3 is the hotter version of the A3 sedan, featuring a more powerful 328 hp version of the 2.0L turbo four, the same 7-speed dual-clutch and quattro AWD, plus sport-tuned suspension and brakes. Marketed by Audi as a separate model from the A3.

reliability.summary: JD Power has not published a 2026 S3 VDS score. The S3 shares its core EA888 engine and MQB Evo platform with the A3 and VW Golf R, with generally average long-term reliability data from Consumer Reports on the platform.

customer_satisfaction.summary: JD Power 2026 APEAL Study has NOT yet been published as of 2026-05-15 (the US APEAL Study typically releases in July). No 2026 model-specific APEAL score is available for this model. The 2025 APEAL score may be applicable as carryover but has not been adopted here pending the 2026 release.

professional_reviews.summary: Reviewers highlight the S3's surprising pace (0-60 in 4.4 sec) and the depth of its dynamics for a compact luxury sport sedan. Common criticisms are an interior that doesn't feel meaningfully more special than a loaded A3 Premium Plus, and a price that overlaps with the more spacious S5.

owner_reviews.summary: Edmunds and KBB owner-review pages for the 2026 S3 are sparse this early in the model year.

notable_other: S sport seats with diamond stitching
S-specific RS torque splitter not fitted (RS 3 only)

trims.notes: Sole trim of the S3 line (singleton trim_family per sole-trim rule). 2026 simplified the lineup to a single trim — Prestige equipment now available as packages. Manufacturer primary source 403 to WebFetch; cross-validated against secondary sources.

models.notes: S3 is a separate model from A3 per Audi marketing (own audiusa.com page). Singleton trim family. 2026 reduces lineup from 3 trims to 1.

models.generation_context: High-performance RS variant of the A3 sedan, built around Audi's unique turbocharged 2.5L inline-5. 2026 retains the previous mid-cycle 'CL/performance' updates including the RS torque splitter and 394 hp tune.
models.model_summary: The RS 3 pairs Audi's 394 hp 2.5L turbocharged five-cylinder with a 7-speed dual-clutch automatic, quattro AWD, and an electronically controlled RS torque splitter at the rear axle, delivering 3.6-second 0-60 acceleration in a compact sedan body. The Dynamic plus package raises the top speed limiter from 155 to 180 mph.

reliability.summary: JD Power has not published a 2026 RS 3 VDS score. The 2.5L five-cylinder is shared with the RS Q3 (global) and has a track record of mostly-strong reliability, though the dual-clutch transmission and AWD hardware can be expensive out of warranty.

customer_satisfaction.summary: JD Power 2026 APEAL Study has NOT yet been published as of 2026-05-15 (the US APEAL Study typically releases in July). No 2026 model-specific APEAL score is available for this model. The 2025 APEAL score may be applicable as carryover but has not been adopted here pending the 2026 release.

professional_reviews.summary: Reviewers consistently rank the RS 3 among the best-driving compact performance sedans, citing the 5-cylinder soundtrack and the trick rear torque splitter that gives it a willingness to rotate. Criticisms focus on the high price relative to similarly-quick alternatives and a firm ride on broken pavement.

owner_reviews.summary: Owner reviews for the 2026 RS 3 are still sparse. Carryover sentiment from prior years is enthusiastic on driving feel and the 5-cylinder character.

notable_other: Dynamic plus package optional (raises top speed to 180 mph, adds ceramic front brakes)

trims.notes: Sole trim of RS 3 line (singleton). Marketed as 'RS 3 performance' for 2026. Manufacturer primary source 403 to WebFetch; cross-validated.

models.notes: Separate model from A3 and S3 per performance-variant rule (own audiusa.com page). Singleton trim family.

models.generation_context: All-new B10 generation Audi A5 (Sportback body — sedan with rear hatch). Replaced the prior B9 A4 sedan in Audi's 2025+ naming rationalization (odd numbers = ICE, even numbers = EV). 2026 carries forward its 2025 launch spec with minor updates.
models.model_summary: Audi's midsize compact luxury sedan, replacing the outgoing A4. Powered by a 268 hp 2.0L turbocharged four-cylinder with a 48V mild-hybrid system, 7-speed dual-clutch, and standard quattro AWD. Sold only as a Sportback (5-door hatchback styled as a sedan) in the US; the prior A5 Coupe and Cabriolet were discontinued.

reliability.summary: JD Power 2026 US VDS rates the audi brand at 244 PP100 (lower is better) — worse than the 204 industry average and worse than the 217 premium-segment average. Consumer Reports 2026 predicts about average (CR explicit) reliability for this model (3/5 on CR's scale). Cross-checked against published CR 2026 reliability page.

customer_satisfaction.summary: JD Power 2026 APEAL Study has NOT yet been published as of 2026-05-15 (the US APEAL Study typically releases in July). No 2026 model-specific APEAL score is available for this model. The 2025 APEAL score may be applicable as carryover but has not been adopted here pending the 2026 release.

professional_reviews.summary: Critics praise the new A5 for its refreshed interior with curved dual-screen design, the lower-than-A4 step-in height, and improved tech. Reviewers note the 2.0T feels adequate but unexceptional vs the V6-powered S5 and rivals like the BMW 3 Series. IIHS named the 2026 A5 a Top Safety Pick+.

owner_reviews.summary: Owner reviews of the new-gen A5 are still accumulating.

notable_other: 5-door Sportback body (hatchback shape, marketed as sedan)

trims.notes: Base trim of A5 line. powertrain.type='hybrid' chosen for 48V MHEV (mild hybrid) classification; ev_specifics fields null since no plug-in capability and no EPA MPGe published for MHEV systems. Manufacturer primary source 403 to WebFetch; cross-validated.

models.model_summary: The S5 is the V6-powered performance version of the A5 Sportback, running a 362 hp turbocharged 3.0L V6 paired to a 7-speed dual-clutch automatic and standard quattro AWD. 0-60 in 4.3 seconds; available in three trims.

reliability.summary: JD Power 2026 US VDS rates the audi brand at 244 PP100 (lower is better) — worse than the 204 industry average and worse than the 217 premium-segment average. Consumer Reports 2026 predicts about average (A5 platform) reliability for this model (3/5 on CR's scale). Cross-checked against published CR 2026 reliability page.

professional_reviews.summary: Reviewers praise the S5 for its strong V6, smooth dual-clutch shifts, and the new PPC platform's improved chassis composure. Common criticisms focus on the high starting price (overlapping with the BMW M340i) and a less raucous exhaust than predecessor S5s.

owner_reviews.summary: Owner reviews are still accumulating for the new-gen S5.

professional_reviews.summary: Reviewers note the new A6 is a clean evolution with a much-improved interior tech suite and the inclusion of the V6 as standard. Criticisms point to overlap with the larger A8 in pricing of top trims, and the loss of the A7's hatchback practicality.

professional_reviews.summary: Critics describe the A8 L as a serene, technology-rich limousine that gets outclassed by the BMW 7 Series and Mercedes S-Class on tech and the new Genesis G90 on value. The 335 hp V6 is adequate but unexciting for the segment, and the design is now several years old.

professional_reviews.summary: Reviewers describe the S8 as a stealthy 563 hp luxury performance sedan that runs to 60 mph in the high-3-second range while remaining a quiet, comfortable limousine. Criticisms focus on the high price relative to a Genesis G90 or BMW 760i and lower tech compared to a Mercedes-AMG S 63.

professional_reviews.summary: Reviewers unanimously praise the RS 6 Avant for its supercar pace combined with wagon practicality (29.9 cu ft cargo behind rear seats). Criticisms note the considerable fuel-economy penalty (16 mpg combined and $1,300 gas-guzzler tax) and price approaching $135k as-tested.

professional_reviews.summary: Reviewers praise the Q4 e-tron's interior quality and ride comfort but note it trails newer EVs (Q6 e-tron, Genesis GV60) on charging speed and tech. Range of 258-288 miles is competitive but not class-leading.

owner_reviews.summary: Owner sentiment from carryover MY: positive on cabin quality, mixed on rear-seat space and DC fast-charging speeds.

professional_reviews.summary: Reviewers praise the Q7's seven-passenger flexibility, interior quality, and the V6 in the 55 TFSI. Criticisms cite a third row tight for adults and a design now several years old. IIHS named the 2026 Q7 a Top Safety Pick.

owner_reviews.summary: Owner sentiment generally positive on luxury and tech; common complaints on rear cargo with all three rows up.
